title: insta-tile-generator config
description: Configuration file for the Instagram tile generator

ep_title.description: Release/EP name — used as the export subfolder name. Defaults to the data folder name.

clip_duration.description: Default clip length in seconds. Omit to use the full track length.

accent_color.description: Accent color for the waveform and headline. Auto-extracted from cover if null.

font_color.description: Text color for track title and copy. Defaults to white (#ffffff).

font.description: Path to a .ttf font file. Uses the system font if null.

format.description: Default output format. square=1080×1080 MP4, reel=1080×1920 MP4, carousel=static PNGs.

overlay_color.description: Gradient overlay color. Defaults to black (#000000).

progress_bar.description: Show a playback progress bar on all tiles.

progress_bar_color.description: Color of the progress bar background track. Defaults to white if null.

typewriter_headline.description: Animate the headline with a typewriter effect (characters appear one by one).

typewriter_copy.description: Animate the copy text with a typewriter effect, starting after the headline finishes.

audio.description: Audio filename relative to the release folder.

image.description: Cover image filename. Falls back to cover.png if omitted.

headline.description: Small uppercase label displayed above the track title.

title.description: Track title. Parsed from the filename if null.

copy.description: Small text line displayed below the title.

start.description: Clip start position. Defaults to the center of the track.

accent_color.description: Per-track accent color override. Inherits EP-level value if null.

font_color.description: Per-track font color override. Inherits EP-level value if null.

font.description: Per-track font path override. Inherits EP-level value if null.

overlay_color.description: Per-track overlay color override. Inherits EP-level value if null.

overlay_opacity.description: Per-track overlay opacity override. Inherits EP-level value if null.

progress_bar_color.description: Per-track progress bar background color override. Inherits EP-level value if null.

typewriter_headline.description: Per-track typewriter override for the headline. Inherits EP-level value if null.

typewriter_copy.description: Per-track typewriter override for the copy text. Inherits EP-level value if null.
